datasets.name: euroc
datasets.notes: Primary odometry benchmark with synchronized IMU. This repo treats EuRoC as a manual-download dataset; grouped archives are present locally and the first-pass extracted sequences are MH_01_easy, MH_03_medium, and V1_02_medium.

datasets.name: eth3d
datasets.notes: Primary reconstruction benchmark with ground-truth geometry. Courtyard, delivery_area, and electro archives are present locally and extracted into their scene folders.
